meta.description: Professional diving center in Mataró. Guided dives, PADI courses and equipment rental for all levels on the Costa del Maresme.
meta.keywords: diving, mataró, padi, dives, diving courses, maresme, scuba diving, barcelona

footer.tagline: Professional diving center in Mataró. Discover the Maresme seabed with our experts.
footer.rights: © {year} MATSUB Centre de Busseig. All rights reserved.

hero.subtitle: Professional diving center in Mataró
hero.description: Guided dives, PADI courses and equipment rental. Explore the marine richness of the Catalan coast with our certified instructors.

why.title: Why choose MATSUB?
why.experience: Over 15 years of experience in the Maresme, with hundreds of trained divers and thousands of dives completed.
why.divesDesc: Weekly trips to the best Maresme spots with PADI-certified guides.
why.coursesDesc: From Open Water to Divemaster. Complete training for all levels.
why.seabedDesc: Discover the marine biodiversity of the Catalan coast: morays, octopuses and rockfish.
why.safetyDesc: Certified equipment, experienced instructors and strict safety protocols.

trips.title: Upcoming trips
trips.subtitle: Book your spot for upcoming dives and courses.

spots.title: Featured spots
spots.subtitle: The best diving spots in the Maresme, just minutes from Mataró.

cta.title: Ready to dive in?

atCenterDone.body: Your booking has been registered. You can pay when you arrive at the dive center.

booking.medicalWarning: If you have or have had any relevant medical condition (heart problems, epilepsy, asthma, diabetes, among others), you must inform us before the activity and/or present a medical certificate of fitness for diving.
booking.emailHint: You'll receive an email to confirm your spot.

booking.success: Booking made! You'll receive a confirmation email.

about.title: About MATSUB
about.intro: We are a diving center founded in Mataró in 2009 with one goal: to bring the underwater world to everyone, safely, sustainably and passionately.
about.history1: MATSUB was born from the shared passion of a group of friends from Mataró who discovered diving and fell in love with the Maresme seabed.
about.history2: In 2009 we opened our center with a clear mission: to offer quality dives, rigorous training and a personal touch that makes every diver feel at home.
about.history3: Today, with over 15 years of experience, we remain the reference center in the area, proud of the community we've built around our love of the sea.
about.teamSubtitle: PADI-certified instructors and guides with years of experience in the Maresme seabed.

marc.name: Marc Puig
marc.bio: Professional diver since age 18. PADI Instructor with over 1,500 students trained. Specialist in Mediterranean seabeds.

anna.name: Anna Solà
anna.bio: Graduated in Marine Biology from UAB. Combines her passion for diving with knowledge of the marine ecosystem.

jordi.name: Jordi Matas
jordi.bio: Divemaster specialising in night diving and underwater photography. Responsible for all equipment maintenance.

about.ctaTitle: Want to meet us in person?
about.ctaDesc: Come visit us at the center, or write to us for any query. We'll be happy to help.
